titleStmt.title: SII 18.199: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 199. (B.K. No. 157 of 1933-34.) BIJAPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Pratāpachakravarti Jaitapāḷadēva and is dated in Śaka 1119, Naḷa, Pushya s11u, Pañchami, Wednesday, Saṁkramaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1196, December 25, Wednesday, f.d.t. 66. The Śaka year cited was the current year.

It registers a grant of land and house site made by Dēḍara Chīlayya to god Bandēśa at Kiṟiy-Iṇḍi. The gift-land was received by him from the king, the Ūroḍeyas, Mūligas, Aṟuavattokkaḷu and Hiṭṭus and handed over to the Saint Chandrābharaṇabrati. Kiṟiy-Iṇḍi (modern Iṇḍi) is stated to be situated in the kampaṇa of Mūvattāṟuṁbāḍa in Tardavāḍi-pradēśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . jaṁbūdvīpada madhyadalli nelasirkkuṁ
boṁdeyoṁdaṁdadiṁ poṁbeṭṭaṁ bharatōrbbidakṣiṇadoḷaṁtā dēśadoḷkuṁtaḷaṁ
śuṁbhatkuṁtaḷadalli śōbhisuvadaṁtā tarddhavāḍipradēśaṁ baṁṇippoḍatarkkya
mā viśayadoḷtāṁ kaṁpaṇaṁ raṁjikuṁ . mūvattāṟuṁbāḍaṁ bhū
vanitāvadanamukuravā kaṁpaṇadoḷu dēvēṁdrapuramaniḷipudu bhāvise
kiṟiyiṁḍiyadaṟa mahimōṁnati tāṁ . haranaṁ bhagīrataṁ(thaṁ) bittaradiṁ meccisi baḷi
kkesagarara mēgāsuranadiyaṁ tarppaṁdī kiṟiyiṁḍige baṁdudoṁdu kaḍalatimu
dadiṁ . Ā kaḍaloḷu karkaṭakananēkaguṇōṁnatiya dibyariśi baṁdaṁ mattā kaḍalēṁ
yahaḷḷamadu karkaṭakāṁkaviṁḍiyeṁbabhidhānaṁ . Aupāsanāgnihōtrigaḷā
puradoḷu nīraghaṭṭiyaṁ taḷadoḷu tarppā patihiteyarssatiyarśśāpānugra
hasamarttharalliya pārbbaru . vēdaṁ śāstraṁ tarkkaṁ vēdāṁtaṁ srmitipurāṇa
kābyāgamadoṁdōdiṁdiruḷuṁ pagaluṁ bāḷenoppuvudu nōḍa
kiṟiyiṁḍi diṭaṁ . harigrihadiṁ (harigṛhadiṁ) suragṛhadiṁdaruha
gṛhade bauddhālayadiṁ goravara savaṇara bauddhara neravigaḷiṁdiṁḍi nā
ḍe sogayisi tōrkkuṁ . Eḷemāviṁ giḷiyiṁ latāpratatiyiṁ bhriṁgā
ḷiyiṁ pūta pūgoḷadiṁ śāḷivanāḷiyiṁ śivagrihabrātaṁgaḷiṁ matta
kōkiḷadiṁ śōbhisuvikṣuvāṭatatiyiṁ pūgīvanaśrēṇiyiṁdiḷegāda
rṣada bhaṁgiyiṁ sogayikuṁ cikkiṁḍiyī dhātriyoḷu . Āvūrūroḍe
yarkaḷu śrīvatsakulābjadinaparenisuvarā mūvarumavarāreṁdaḍe
sōvarasaṁ kēśirāja vibhu bammarasaṁ . Avaranvayamaṁ pēḷvaḍe bhuvanastu
tanenipa nāraṇadvēdige saṁbhavirsidarava reṁdaḍe kavigamakigaḷaḷave pogaḷaluṁThe letter va is written above the line.
baṁṇisaluṁ . vinayāṁbhōnidhi boppadēvavibhugaṁ lachchauvvegaṁ puṭṭidaṁ ma
numārggaṁ guṇiyappa baṁmarasanā nāgauvvegaṁ vipravaṁśanidhānaṁ gu
ṇiyappa kāḷimarasaṁgaṁ puṭṭidaṁ kēśavaṁ vanajaprōdbhavavaṁśabhūśaṇa
nagaṇyaudāryyakaḻpadrumaṁ . śrīmādirājavibhugaṁ śrīmānini ci
kkaṇabbeyavarirbbargaṁ sōmayyaṁ vāmayyaṁ prēmadinogedarpparārtthapā
vanacaritaru . koḷadoḷu jaḷaruhadaṁtire jaḷanidhiyoḷu kṛṣṇanaṁte madhyastha ja
nakkaḷikada tiḷakada teṟadiṁ kuladīpakaṁ nācirājaniṁḍiyoḷippaṁ . Āṟuvatteṁṭuṁ tī
rtthade kiḻeyiṇḍiya ṭhāvu lēsenuttolavindaṁ peṟeyaṁ sūḍida dēvan kaṟekaṇṭhaṁ ne
lasi baṁdināthaṁ niṁdaṁ . Ā caṁdracūḍadēvaṁgācāryyaṁ dibyamuṁmunīṁdrā
bharaṇaṁ śrīcaṁdrābharaṇabrati yācakakaḻpadrumaṁ śivāgamatajñaṁ . Ākiḻeyi
ṇḍiyalli . dēḍaradāsana kuladoḷu nōḍire sōmayyanogedanātana sati tāṁ nōḍa pa
tibrate sadguṇi rūḍhiya hollauvveyeṁbaḷabaḷāratnaṁ . Avarirbbarggogedaṁ tām
bhuvanastutanenisi negaḷda cīlāḷvaṁ saṁbhavisidavolu cīlayyaṁ kavijanasaṁstu
tyanenipa mailaṁ kētaṁ . narapāḷāgraṇi jaitapāḷanṛpanuṁ śrīlakṣmidē
vāṁkanuṁ dhuradhīraṁ nereyoḍe gaṁḍanenipī śrībaṁdabhūpāḷanuṁ parivāraṁ
kalisāhaṇādhipati tāṁ śrīsaṁganuṁ doṁganuṁ puruśarmmūvaruveṁbavō
lnegaḷdaraṁtā mūvaruṁ mūligaru . sthānaṁ mānyaṁ piṭṭuṁ bhūnutarappaṟu
vatokkaluṁ baṁmarasaṁ mānanidhi kēśirājaṁ jaināgamavārddhisōmanenisuva
sōmaṁ . © svasti śrīmatpratāpacakravartti yādavanārāyaṇa jaitapāḷadēva
ru dēvagiriya nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire sakava
ruśada 1119 neya naḷasaṁvatsarada puśya śuddha paṁcami budhavāra saṁkrama
ṇadaṁdu . Inibara kaiyoḷu dhāreyananunayadiṁ paḍadu baḷika dēḍara
cīlammunicaṁdrābharaṇabratiganunayadiṁ kālakarcci dhāreyanittaṁ . haṁneraḍu kaiya ma
neyaṁ haṁnirmmattarssubhūvi yappā keyyaṁ taṁnolaviṁbaṁdēśaṁguṁnatamati dēḍacī
la dhāreyanitaṁ(ttaṁ) . mēlāḷike maneyanuṁ mūligaruṁ prabhugaḷeṇṭu hiṭṭuṁ mānyaṁ kēḷire sa
rbbanamaśyava pāḷipevāmeṁdu dhāreyittarmudadiṁ . kētōjaṁ baṁmmōjaṁ nūtana
manu viśvakaṁrmmareṁbarkkaḍadarkhyātaṁ beḍagina sōmaṁ sātisayōkti
yoḷe pēḷdanene meccadarāru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvaruśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimi © © © Ī kattigeyaṁ koṁḍiṁtī kavileya koṁdu
nettaraṁ bēganileyiṁdākaṁṭhōṣṭaṁ kuḍidavanī keygaruvaṇama
naḷiva māḍida manujaṁ © ©
Digital edition of SII 18.199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
